nodes.name: ⏰ 8 AM PHT Daily
nodes.notes:
Fires at 8:00 AM daily in your n8n instance timezone.
Make sure your n8n instance timezone is set to Asia/Manila (PHT).
Settings → General → Timezone → Asia/Manila.

values.content:
Act as an elite short-form video strategist for the North American Gen Z/Alpha Roblox market. Your goal is maximum retention, engagement, and virality. Generate a script for a 20-second cinematic, hyper-realistic Roblox video based on current trends (DOORS, Blox Fruits, Dress to Impress, Brookhaven, etc.).

Today's date is: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

Output strictly in this exact JSON format and NOTHING else:
{
  "file_code_name": "2-3 words separated by dashes, e.g. doors-figure-chase",
  "title_concept": "A short viral title concept",
  "hook_text": "Bold on-screen text hook for 0-3s designed to interrupt scrolling",
  "hook_visual_prompt": "Detailed Nano Banana 2 image prompt for the hook frame",
  "voiceover_script": "Full US-slang voiceover script for the entire 20s video. Last word must flow into the first word of hook_text for seamless looping.",
  "veo_motion_prompts": [
    "Veo 3.1 motion/camera prompt for cut 1 with audio description",
    "Veo 3.1 motion/camera prompt for cut 2 with audio description",
    "Veo 3.1 motion/camera prompt for cut 3 with audio description"
  ],
  "easter_egg": "Description of hidden visual Easter Egg OR controversial debate statement",
  "nano_banana_prompts": [
    "Full Nano Banana 2 prompt for scene/frame 1 (9:16 vertical, UE5 aesthetic, volumetric fog, dramatic rim lighting, 8k textures)",
    "Full Nano Banana 2 prompt for scene/frame 2",
    "Full Nano Banana 2 prompt for scene/frame 3"
  ]
}

Generate today's viral Roblox video concept. Make it completely different from yesterday. Focus on whatever Roblox game or trend is most culturally relevant right now. Push the boundaries of creativity.

nodes.name: 🧠 Generate Daily Concept
nodes.notes:
Uses GPT-4o with high temperature (0.95) for creative variety.
Response format forced to JSON so downstream nodes can parse fields.
The system prompt includes today's date for freshness.
Replace credential ID with your actual OpenAI credential.

nodes.name: 📋 Parse AI Response
nodes.notes:
Parses the GPT JSON response into flat fields for Sheets and Telegram.
Veo and Nano prompts are joined with ' ||| ' delimiter for single-cell storage.

nodes.name: 📊 Log to Content Tracker
nodes.notes:
Appends one row to your 'Roblox Content Tracker' spreadsheet.
Column headers MUST exactly match: Date | File Code Name | Title Concept | Hook | Script | Status
Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with the actual spreadsheet ID from the URL.

nodes.name: 📱 Send Brief to Phone
nodes.notes:
Sends the full production brief to your Telegram chat.
Replace YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID with your personal chat ID.
To get your chat ID: message @userinfobot on Telegram.
To create a bot: message @BotFather → /newbot.
